meaning: n.地图,图v.绘制地图 [计]由LINK工具生成的一种文本文件,其中包含有被连接的程序的某些信息,例如程序中的组信息和公共符号信息等
examples: He traced the route on the map.
Are you any good at map reading?
He laid the map out on the table.
Now many images can be found on a unified website, including The Gough Map.
There is no record of any similar medieval map with such scale or accuracy.
